one_line: Built a non-core wrapper rule-ablation harness over rex/harness.py:is_safe (disables each rule by reason-string override) and ran it on 42 scenarios/580 labeled actions: full is_safe acc=0.933; per-rule accuracy drop R1_forbidden_category 0.357 (+207 false-allows), R2_leak_restart 0.007, R3_last_ready_node 0.004, R5_rollback_no_deploy 0.002, R4_replica_limit 0.000 (untriggered); 4/4 hermetic tests pass
